In this canonical finite sample, the one-step Hotz-Miller row already recovers the main policy well because the empirical CCPs have full support. NPL iterations are still the estimator used for the hard validation because they move the pseudo-likelihood mapping toward the MLE fixed point and provide the appropriate structural object for standard errors.
